summary: Create an investor-ready pitch deck with compelling narrative, data visualization, and structured storytelling.

inputs.name: company_narrative
inputs.description: The core company story, problem being solved, and vision.

inputs.name: metrics
inputs.description: Key business metrics, traction data, and milestones.

inputs.name: target_investors
inputs.description: Target investor profile or specific fund thesis.

outputs.name: deck_outline
outputs.description: Complete slide-by-slide deck outline with narrative flow.

outputs.name: data_visualizations
outputs.description: Recommended charts and data presentations for key slides.

outputs.name: talking_points
outputs.description: Speaker notes and talking points for each slide.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is pitch deck creation, not sales collateral.
Require company narrative and metrics before building deck.
Deck must follow problem-solution-traction-ask narrative structure.

steps.action: Design narrative arc from problem through solution to ask.
Prepare financial metrics and projections for data slides.
Create slide-by-slide outline with content and visual recommendations.
Review deck for strategic coherence and investor-readiness.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read existing business documents, metrics, and prior analysis.

verification.method: Check key claims are supported by metrics.
Check the ask slide clearly states amount and use of funds.

success_criteria: Deck follows proven pitch narrative structure.
All key claims are backed by data or evidence.
The ask is clear with specific amount and use of funds.

rollback.when: If outputs invent metrics or misrepresent findings, roll back to raw inputs.
